extracted.title: Egan Meter Underperformance
extracted.description:
Egan Hub Storage (Egan) has limited ability to absorb due pipe imbalances from receipt and/or delivery point operators. As such, Egan is requiring the following meter operator to perform to scheduled quantities or confirmation restrictions will be made commensurate with anticipated physical receipts.

Loc 45113 - FGT-STORAGE, LA (D40114/R40113), Acadia County, LA

Effective immediately, for Gas Day January 22, 2026, Egan will schedule receipt nominations and IWS activity from meter 45113 commensurate with anticipated physical receipts.

Furthermore, if corrective action is not taken to perform to scheduled quantities, Egan may restrict receipt nominations and IWS activity to -0- beginning Gas Day January 23, 2026.

Egan will continue to monitor performance at this meter for future gas days.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.
